title: 7 Herbal Teas For Bunion
description: Achillea millefolium teas contains compounds like sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and polyphenols, which contribute to its healing properties. These sesquiterpene lactones, such as achilleine and tanacetone, have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain in the affected area.
